subcodes.first_line: The Hands of Divine Bounty have nurtured all, and through the tongue of His own Manifestations hath He educated all who dwell in the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایادی عطای الهی کل را تربیت نموده و بلسان مظاهر نفس خود جمیع من فی العالم را
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @Manifestation of God as educator
